blended.narrative: Grouse Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 919 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
